protocol.name: zwlr_layer_shell_v1

interface.name: zwlr_layer_shell_v1
interface.summary: create surfaces that are layers of a full-screen composition

description.summary: create surfaces that are layers of a full-screen composition

interface.description: The purpose of this interface is to enable shell components to be able to create surfaces that are layered above normal application surfaces, with the keyboard being exclusive to a layer surface when it is focused.

description.summary: create a layer surface from a surface

interface.name: zwlr_layer_surface_v1
interface.description: A layer surface is an interface for creating surfaces that are layered above normal application surfaces.

entry.name: on_demand
entry.summary: keyboard focus when the surface is focused

entry.name: top
entry.summary: the top edge of the anchor rectangle

entry.name: bottom
entry.summary: the bottom edge of the anchor rectangle

entry.name: left
entry.summary: the left edge of the anchor rectangle

entry.name: right
entry.summary: the right edge of the anchor rectangle

request.name: set_size

description.summary: set the size of the surface

request.description: Set the width and height of the surface.

request.name: set_anchor

description.summary: set the anchor of the surface

request.description: Set which edge(s) the surface is anchored to.

request.name: set_exclusive_zone

description.summary: set the exclusive zone of the surface

request.description: Set the exclusive zone of the surface.

request.name: set_margin

description.summary: set a margin from the anchor point

request.description: Requests that the surface be placed some distance away from the anchor point on the output, in surface-local coordinates.

description.summary: assign a xdg_popup to this layer surface

request.name: destroy
request.description: This request destroys the layer surface.

event.name: configure
event.description: The compositor sends a configure event.
